ddls:
CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was posted */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the comment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the comment */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the comment was posted */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to post the comment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment was posted anonymously */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the topic is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the topic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., moderator, admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last active */,
  "is_banned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently banned */,
  "ban_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the ban if the user is banned */,
  "ban_until" TEXT /* Date and time until which the user is banned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being flagged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user raising the flag */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for raising the flag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the flag was raised */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flag (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_flags_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_flags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being responded to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responding */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the response was posted */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the response was posted anonymously */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the response was posted */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to post the response */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_responses_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_insults" (
  "insult_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insult classification */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being classified */,
  "is_insult" INTEGER /* Whether the comment is an insult (true) or not (false) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the insult classification was made */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who classified the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insult_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_insults_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_insults_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being engaged with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the comment */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., like, dislike, reply) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the engagement event occurred */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the engagement was anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderator_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderator action */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being moderated */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator taking the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., delete, suspend, ban) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the action was taken */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the action taken */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the action if applicable (e.g., suspension duration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_actions_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_actions_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user raising the report */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for raising the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was raised */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_reports_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_bans" (
  "ban_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ban */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being banned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the ban */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the ban (in days) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the ban was issued */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ban (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ban_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_bans_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user liking the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the like was given */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the like was anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_likes_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being replied to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user replying */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the reply */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was posted */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reply was anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_replies_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the share was made */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the share was anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_shares_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
